title: 3 Eerie Disappearances in History

segments.text: In 1915, an entire ship vanished without a trace.
And it's one of many perplexing disappearances.
First, the USS Cyclops, lost in the Bermuda Triangle.
Over 300 men and cargo disappeared, never to be found.
Next, the crew of the Mary Celeste—found abandoned at sea.
Food and belongings were intact, yet no one was aboard.
Finally, the disappearance of Flight 370, fading from radar.
Despite extensive searches, not a single piece was recovered.
What happened to these lost souls?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: History is riddled with disappearances we can't solve. Follow for daily mysteries! 🕵️
